05:10:14.078 [main ] INFO c.a.t.examples.SelfHealingExampleTest - ========== TEST 4: SELF-HEALING RECOVERY ========== 05:10:14.078 [main ] INFO c.a.t.examples.SelfHealingExampleTest - Objective: Show recovery when primary locator fails
05:10:15.158 [main ] INFO c.a.t.examples.SelfHealingExampleTest - ✓ Navigated to application
05:10:16.166 [main ] INFO c.a.t.examples.SelfHealingExampleTest - Demonstrating self-healing recovery process: 05:10:16.167 [main ] INFO c.a.t.examples.SelfHealingExampleTest - If the ID 'user-name' doesn't exist on the page: 05:10:16.167 [main ] INFO c.a.t.examples.SelfHealingExampleTest - 1. Primary locator By.id('user-name') will FAIL 05:10:16.167 [main ] INFO c.a.t.examples.SelfHealingExampleTest - 2. Self-Healing Engine activates automatically 05:10:16.167 [main ] INFO c.a.t.examples.SelfHealingExampleTest - 3. NLP tokenizer analyzes all visible input elements 05:10:16.167 [main ] INFO c.a.t.examples.SelfHealingExampleTest - 4. Calculates similarity: 'user-name' vs element attributes 05:10:16.167 [main ] INFO c.a.t.examples.SelfHealingExampleTest - 5. Returns element with highest similarity score 05:10:16.167 [main ] INFO c.a.t.examples.SelfHealingExampleTest - 6. Test continues without manual intervention
